responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete final production closeout for IVX Holdings: Android crash + cropping repair APK built, now fixing new QA bug тАФ Owner AI chat `no_supabase_session` error

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically тАФ manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors must match landing page тАФ `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Landing QA: do not mark production ready because routes return 200; require live evidence
- Do not write COMPLETE, CERTIFIED, VERIFIED or FINAL until every required QA item passes
- If real-device test cannot be performed, report: BLOCKED тАФ REAL DEVICE QA NOT EXECUTED
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://www.ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- Use `bun x` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- EAS credentials (`EXPO_TOKEN`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID`) NOT available тАФ building APK locally with Gradle instead
- Reels refactor: only 1 active player, max 3 mounted (active ┬▒ 1), 80% viewability threshold
- NEVER ask user for credentials тАФ find them in the project or work around the blocker
- Autonomous dashboard: never fabricate activity; every item must have real evidence; show IDLE if no task executing
- Status must be `QA IN PROGRESS` until ALL required items pass including real-device QA, screen recordings, and CloudFront invalidation
- expo-file-system v19 uses `File`/`Directory` classes; legacy API available via `expo-file-system/legacy` import
- Android Gradle build requires `--no-watch-fs` flag (Watchman gets stuck in sandbox)
- Real Android device test was performed and FAILED тАФ app crashed after ~14 seconds, UI horizontally cropped; do not mark Android QA as passed

## Progress
### Done
- **17-section IVX Holdings production QA audit COMPLETED** тАФ full evidence-based audit written to `qa-evidence/FINAL_OWNERSHIP_QA_AUDIT.md`
- **`IVX_DISASTER_RECOVERY.md` CREATED** at project root тАФ 16-step clean-room recovery procedure, env var inventory, service inventory, deployment runbook, rollback procedure
- **Rork dependency audit: ZERO runtime dependencies confirmed**: `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk` removed, `withRorkMetro` removed, `rork.json` absent, URL guard blocks `*.rork.com`
- **GitHub repo**: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, branch `main`. Git remote through `rork-git-router.rork-direct.workers.dev` as transport proxy
- **Git sync RESOLVED**: Local HEAD = GitHub HEAD = `cdc8cd2329bd19b761216aecb5766907c8d9e6c7` тАФ all commits synced, zero unpushed
- **CORS wildcard FIXED (Phase 5)**: 3 locations changed from `*` to `https://ivxholding.com` тАФ `backend/hono.ts` line 5071, `backend/api/ivx-owner-action-requests.ts` lines 348 & 356. Verified live
- **Dashboard export IMPLEMENTED (Phase 7)**: New file `expo/src/modules/ivx-owner-ai/services/ivxDashboardExport.ts` тАФ CSV/JSON/PDF export for 10 report types. Export UI added to `expo/app/ivx/autonomous-ops.tsx`
- **TypeScript: Both frontend and backend compile with 0 errors**. Fixed 4 pre-existing backend TS errors
- **iOS bundle ID FIXED**: Changed from `app.rork.r64gj6i3shhxqnlbhiewv` to `com.ivxholdings.app` in `ios-ivx/Ivx.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj` (all 6 occurrences)
- **Analytics infrastructure AUDITED and EXPANDED**: 12 first-party events, 5 ad platform events, 4 reel events. Added reel_view/complete/like/comment/share/save and registration_start
- **Android versionCode incremented**: 4тЖТ5 in both `expo/app.config.ts` AND `expo/android/app/build.gradle` (versionName 1.3.0тЖТ1.4.0)
- **Production regression ALL PASS**: Landing 200, API health 200, chat 200, www 200, reels 6 videos unified, member count verified, CORS correct, protected routes 401
- **Android crash ROOT CAUSE DIAGNOSED + FIXED**: `DealVideoCard` had `shouldPlay={true}` hardcoded тАФ every video card in home feed autoplayed simultaneously, overloading ExoPlayer/MediaCodec. Fix: viewability detection via `measure()`, AppState listener, poster-first rendering
- **Cropping ROOT CAUSE DIAGNOSED + FIXED (7 files)**: `bottomGradient` negative offsets, `salePriceChip` minWidth overflow, missing safe-area edges, no flexWrap, incorrect cardWidth тАФ all fixed
- **Post-fix verification**: TypeScript 0 errors, Lint 0 errors
- **Watchman blocker DEFEATED**: Fake watchman at `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` + `PATH="/tmp/fake-bin:$PATH"` + `--no-watch-fs` flag тЖТ Gradle build succeeded in 1m 31s. Metro bundled 3847 modules in 24260ms.
- **NEW APK BUILT SUCCESSFULLY**: `ivx-holdings-v1.4.0.apk` тАФ 82,792,662 bytes (78 MB), SHA256 `5d2d796119d9905958088f39c2b1d23cc8ade0a0eccc7073b8363fb069781b3e`, versionCode=5, versionName=1.4.0, built 2026-07-14 04:40 UTC
- **Bundle verification CONFIRMED**: Fix signatures found in APK bundle тАФ VideoCardBoundary (1), flexShrink (1), flexWrap (1), m3u8 HLS fallback (1), bottomGradient (1), edges (1), "temporarily unavailable" error message (20), Play icon overlay (3)
- **APK uploaded to tmpfiles.org**: Download link provided to user at `https://tmpfiles.org/wawR1H5nq23y/ivx-holdings-v1.4.0.apk` (expires in 1 hour)

### In Progress
- **Owner AI chat `no_supabase_session` QA bug fix** тАФ User screenshot shows chat letting user type and send, then failing with `Owner session required (no_supabase_session)`. Fix started in `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`: added import of `runOwnerSessionPreflight`, added `ownerSessionPreflight` state (`checking`/`needs_signin`/`ready`), added `useEffect` to run preflight on mount. Still need to: add sign-in gate UI before composer, disable composer when `needs_signin`, show "Sign in as IVX Owner" button routing to `/ivx/auth-diagnostics` or `/login?ownerMode=1`
- **APK rebuild needed** after owner chat fix is complete

### Blocked
- **Real Android device QA**: No `adb` access, no connected device in sandbox. APK is built and ready but cannot test on device. User needs to install `ivx-holdings-v1.4.0.apk` and run acceptance checklist (3 cold starts, 50 swipes, 30-min session, background/foreground, Wi-FiтЖТCellular, owner login, registration, chat)
- **CloudFront invalidation**: IAM user `Rork1` lacks `cloudfront:CreateInvalidation` permission (distribution `d1f3efsob2d4cv.cloudfront.net`)
- **www redirect**: `www.ivxholding.com` returns 200 instead of 301 redirecting to apex
- **Analytics IDs**: Need real values for `EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_ADS_API_KEY`, `META_PIXEL_ID`, `TIKTOK_PIXEL_ID`, `LINKEDIN_PARTNER_ID`
- **iOS signing**: `DEVELOPMENT_TEAM` empty, needs Apple Developer Team ID

## Key Decisions
- DealVideoCard viewability uses `viewRef.current.measure()` with 500ms interval polling тАФ checks if тЙе60% of card is visible on screen, combined with AppState check for foreground
- HLS fallback: SafeVideo now returns HLS URI on Android instead of `null` тАФ ExoPlayer can handle basic HLS, null caused infinite mount/unmount cycles and resource leaks
- `VideoCardBoundary` wraps each DealVideoCard in InvestorFirstFeed тАФ one bad video shows "Video temporarily unavailable" instead of crashing the home feed
- Fake watchman approach SUCCEEDED: `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman` script (exits 0) placed first in PATH via `PATH="/tmp/fake-bin:$PATH"` тАФ Gradle-launched Metro used polling instead of Watchman
- Owner chat fix approach: proactive preflight gate using `runOwnerSessionPreflight()` on component mount, before user can type тАФ prevents wasted messages and shows clear sign-in path
- Sign-in routes for owner chat: `/ivx/auth-diagnostics` (already used in chat for auth failures) or `/login?ownerMode=1` (used in other owner-gated flows)

## Next Steps
1. Complete owner AI chat `no_supabase_session` fix тАФ add sign-in gate UI, disable composer when no session
2. Rebuild APK with owner chat fix
3. Upload new APK for user to download and test on real device
4. User runs acceptance checklist on real Android device: 3 cold starts, 50 swipes, 30-min session, background/foreground 5├Ч, Wi-FiтЖТCellular, owner login, registration, chat
5. Capture `adb logcat` and screen recording during device test
6. Resolve remaining blockers: CloudFront invalidation, www redirect, analytics IDs, iOS signing
7. Complete final evidence table and certify

## Critical Context
- New APK: `expo/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk` (also copied to project root as `ivx-holdings-v1.4.0.apk`)
- Old stale APK: SHA256 `cd21a6cdcf152e5ddde3b2ad3885c0dce2d4c7a3a40bc7fc41aeef4a0a9d2e42`, versionCode=4, versionName=1.3.0 тАФ does NOT contain fixes
- Git SHA: `cdc8cd2329bd19b761216aecb5766907c8d9e6c7`, branch `main`, 0 unpushed commits
- Backend SHA: `5533c6d04073b834ada1eaf1ced94ca1704a9992`, boot 2026-07-14T01:57:48Z
- Gradle build command that works: `PATH="/tmp/fake-bin:$PATH" ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk ./gradlew assembleRelease --build-cache --no-daemon --no-watch-fs -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false -Dorg.gradle.jvmargs="-Xmx2048m -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=512m"`
- Build log at `/tmp/gradle-v6.log` тАФ 616 lines, "BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 31s"
- Gradle uses `expo export:embed` as bundle command (not `react-native bundle`), entry file is `node_modules/expo-router/entry.js`
- `pkill -9` causes bash shell to die (exit 128) тАФ avoid using it; use `nohup setsid` to start background processes
- App config: `orientation: 'portrait'`, `updates.enabled: false`, `newArchEnabled: false`, SDK 54.0.0
- Owner chat file is very large (6470+ lines) тАФ composer at line ~6360-6450, component entry at line 848

## Relevant Files
- `expo/app/ivx/chat.tsx`: Owner AI chat screen тАФ fix in progress for `no_supabase_session` proactive gate; component at line 848, composer at ~6360
- `expo/src/modules/ivx-owner-ai/services/ownerSessionPreflight.ts`: Owner session preflight logic тАФ exports `runOwnerSessionPreflight`, `OWNER_SESSION_REQUIRED_LABEL`
- `expo/components/DealVideoCard.tsx`: CRASH FIX тАФ viewability gating, AppState listener, poster-first rendering, Play icon overlay
- `expo/components/SafeVideo.tsx`: HLS fallback fix for Android (return URI instead of null)
- `expo/components/InvestorFirstFeed.tsx`: VideoCardBoundary ErrorBoundary + safeCardWidth calculation
- `expo/components/TrustDealCard.tsx`: Cropping fix тАФ salePriceChip flexShrink, headerRow flexWrap, headerCopy minWidth
- `expo/app/videos.tsx`: Cropping fix тАФ bottomGradient left/right set to 0
- `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/home.tsx`: SafeAreaView edges changed to include left/right
- `expo/app/(tabs)/market.tsx`: indexBannerStats flexWrap + minWidth for narrow screens
- `expo/metro.config.js`: Has `config.watcher.useWatchman = false`
- `expo/app.config.ts`: versionCode=5, orientation=portrait, updates disabled
- `expo/android/app/build.gradle`: versionCode=5, versionName=1.4.0 (updated from 4/1.3.0)
- `/tmp/fake-bin/watchman`: Fake watchman script (exits 0) тАФ key to defeating Watchman blocker
- `/tmp/gradle-v6.log`: Successful build log (616 lines)
- `ivx-holdings-v1.4.0.apk`: Built APK at project root (78 MB)
